title: palicourea subundulata
intro: Palicourea subundulata, also known as the 'Wild Coffee', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Palicourea subundulata include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever, as well as its use in treating various infections. In traditional medicine, Palicourea subundulata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
